name: Predictable Value Range from Previous Values
description: The product's random number generator produces values that, based on observing previous outputs, allow an attacker to determine a relatively small range of possibilities for the next value. This reduces the brute-force effort needed to guess security-sensitive values such as tokens or session identifiers.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM[rng_output] produces values where observing prior EGRESS outputs allows narrowing the next value to a small range rather than the full output space. Look for generators with monotonic, bounded, or patterned output sequences that flow into AUTH[token], EGRESS[identifier], or STORAGE[key] nodes where reduced entropy enables practical brute-force attacks.
